ddls:
CREATE TABLE "candidates" (
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the candidate */,
  "party" TEXT /* Party affiliation of the candidate (e.g., REP, DEM) */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the candidate */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the candidate */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the candidate */,
  "website" TEXT /* Candidate's campaign website */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the candidate */,
  "photo_url" TEXT /* URL of the candidate's photo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "offices" (
  "office_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each office */,
  "office_name" TEXT /* Name of the office (e.g., State Representative) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the office */,
  "term_length" INTEGER /* Term length of the office in years */,
  "is_elected" INTEGER /* Whether the office is elected or appointed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("office_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each district */,
  "district_number" INTEGER /* Number of the district (e.g., 124) */,
  "state" TEXT /* State the district is in */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the district */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the district in square miles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county (e.g., Berks) */,
  "state" TEXT /* State the county is in */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the county */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the county in square miles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "elections" (
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election */,
  "election_name" TEXT /* Name of the election (e.g., General Election) */,
  "election_date" TEXT /* Date the election was held */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of election (e.g., General, Primary, Special) */,
  "is_open" INTEGER /* Whether the election is open for voting */,
  "registration_deadline" TEXT /* Registration deadline for the election */,
  "early_voting_start" TEXT /* Start date for early voting */,
  "early_voting_end" TEXT /* End date for early voting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate in the result */,
  "office_id" INTEGER /* ID of the office being elected */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* ID of the district the office represents */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county the result is for */,
  "votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes the candidate received */,
  "winner" INTEGER /* Whether the candidate won the election */,
  "percentage" REAL /* Percentage of votes received by the candidate */,
  "total_votes" INTEGER /* Total number of votes cast in the election */,
  "voting_method" TEXT /* Method of voting (e.g., Mail, In-Person, Electronic) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_office_id FOREIGN KEY ("office_id") REFERENCES offices ("office_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_offices" (
  "election_office_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election-office pair */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election */,
  "office_id" INTEGER /* ID of the office */,
  "is_open_for_candidates" INTEGER /* Whether the office is open for candidates to run in the election */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("election_office_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_offices_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_offices_office_id FOREIGN KEY ("office_id") REFERENCES offices ("office_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidate_offices" (
  "candidate_office_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate-office pair */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate */,
  "office_id" INTEGER /* ID of the office */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* ID of the district the office represents */,
  "is_incumbent" INTEGER /* Whether the candidate is an incumbent for the office */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_office_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidate_offices_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidate_offices_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidate_offices_office_id FOREIGN KEY ("office_id") REFERENCES offices ("office_id")
)
